actions.description: Reviewed docs/architecture.md and docs/workflow.md to align with Tier 2 prerequisites.
Scaffolded plan via tools.planner.cli new with systemic/layer metadata and queued steps.
Captured receipt bundle (tools.receipts.main scaffold + planner validator runs) and attached to step S3.
Logged Tier 1 compute donation with python3 -m teof up --contribute for contributor codex-tier2.
Seeded bus claim QUEUE-200 via tools.agent.claim_seed to tie plan to coordination lane.
Updated plan links/receipts and reran planner validation (strict) after wiring claim reference.
Bootstrapped codex-tier2 session (session_boot) with bus_status + dashboard receipts to enter the autonomy lane.
